tech_news.title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Nintendo Co.’s shares fell by the most in a month after the game maker’s presentation of upcoming games came up short on brand-new titles from heavyweight franchises such as Mario.

tech_news.title: Toby Fox Shares New Development Update On Deltarune Chapter 6 - Nintendo Life
tech_news.description: Work on Chapter 7 may also start this year

tech_news.title: The 25 Most Exciting Games Of Summer Game Fest 2026 - Game Informer
tech_news.description: There were hundreds of game trailers shown at tons of events over the last week, but these were our favorites.

tech_news.title: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon - The Verge
tech_news.description: The App Store will soon include subscription bundles for iPhone apps from different companies, along with “suites” of subscriptions.

tech_news.title: Starlink charges $10 monthly hardware fee in move away from one-time purchases - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: Starlink, SpaceX's top moneymaker, also raised service prices by $5 to $10.

tech_news.title: Destiny 2 Hits Highest Player Count in Two Years Following Final Update's Release, Shatters Marathon's All-Time Peak - IGN
tech_news.description: Destiny 2 is seeing a massive resurgence with the release of its final update.

tech_news.title: NBA The Run Review - IGN
tech_news.description: A quick-match basketball game that plays more like a distant descendant of NBA Street than a true successor.

tech_news.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its long-standing Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

tech_news.title: God of War Laufey Director Pushes Back on Cosmic Cube Criticism: Phranque Was Always In and Enables “Super Cool” Mechanics - Wccftech
tech_news.description: God of War Laufey director defends Phranque’s inclusion. The cosmic cube was always part of the plan and unlocks some “super cool” mechanics.

tech_news.title: Microsoft June 2026 Patch Tuesday fixes 3 zero-day, 200 flaws - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Today is Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday, with security updates for 200 flaws and three publicly disclosed zero-day vulnerabilities.
